summary: PR #84028 is the canonical automerge candidate, but the hydrated ClawSweeper comment and live PR metadata show it is dirty/conflicting. The branch is safe to repair because maintainer_can_modify is true, the diff is narrow, and the only actionable blocker is refresh/rebase of generated Arabic i18n output against current main.

actions.reason: Automerge is blocked by conflicts/dirty state, but the contributor branch is editable and the repair scope is bounded to generated Arabic i18n refresh plus validation.
A complete executable repair artifact is available and allowed by the job's fix/raise_pr permissions.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #84028 by refreshing the Arabic Control UI translation generated files against current main, preserving the PR's intended Arabic translations and glossary alignment while resolving the dirty/conflicting merge state.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(ui): improve Arabic Control UI translations
repair_candidate.pr_body:
What Problem This Solves

Arabic Control UI strings still show English fallbacks or inconsistent terminology across Skills, chat, browser/tool profile labels, and Cron empty states.

Why This Change Was Made

This repairs contributor PR #84028 by refreshing the Arabic locale, translation memory, and glossary against current main so the branch is mergeable while preserving @aim9sour's translation work and glossary choice for Skills -> المهارات.

User Impact

Arabic users see localized Control UI labels in the affected Skills, chat, and Cron surfaces instead of English fallback text.

Evidence

- Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/84028 by @aim9sour.
- Hydrated ClawSweeper review found the patch quality/proof sufficient but blocked merge because the head is CONFLICTING/DIRTY.
- Current main still contains English fallback strings in ui/src/i18n/locales/ar.ts.
- Validation to run after repair: pnpm ui:i18n:sync, pnpm ui:i18n:check, pnpm check:changed.
credit_notes: Repair the existing contributor branch for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/84028, authored by @aim9sour.
Preserve @aim9sour as the source PR author and keep the PR body credit intact; this is a branch repair, not a replacement.

fix_actions.reason: fix execution deadline exceeded before Codex /review; 101866ms remains, 90000ms reserved for report upload
